destinations.name: Ha Long Bay Escape
destinations.description: A coastal destination with limestone islands, boat tours, local seafood, and calm overnight cruises.

destinations.name: Da Nang Beach Break
destinations.description: A city and beach trip with modern hotels, mountain views, night markets, and easy access to Hoi An.

destinations.name: Sa Pa Mountain Stay
destinations.description: A northern highland destination with terraced fields, cool weather, homestays, and guided trekking routes.
